title: ARIMA Model Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps and components involved in building an Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) model for time series analysis.
relationships: Original series is input to Differencing step
Stationary series is input for AR and MA components
AR and MA components combine with Integration parameter (d) to form the ARIMA model
ARIMA model is used for Fitting and Forecasting
